**Cursor** — add to `.cursor/mcp.json`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "mnemoverse": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": [
        "-y",
        "@mnemoverse/mcp-memory-server@latest"
      ],
      "env": {
        "MNEMOVERSE_API_KEY": "mk_live_YOUR_KEY"
      }
    }
  }
}
```
